productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Lakers Black Purple Cap
description: CompositionBlack and purple cap made of 100% cotton, that has eyelets on the panels, adjustable buckle on the back, brand name embroidered on the side,  NBA brand name embroidered on the back, Lakers logo printed and embroidered on the front, iconic three stripes appliqued on the vizorWash careHand wash in cold waterDo not dry cleanDo not tumble drySupport the Lakers on and off the court with this cap from adidas. Made of cotton, this cap with the eyelets on the panels ensures you stay dry and comfortable while you cheer the team to victory. The buckle at the back allows you to adjust the fitting accordingly to allow the cap to stay snug around your head, while the symbol of the Lakers adorn the front crown, giving it a stylish touch.
